items.title_en: Taiwan insists it is independent after Trump warning
items.title_zh: 特朗普警告后台湾坚称独立
items.desc_en: Fresh from his summit in Beijing, the US president warned against a formal declaration of independence by the island.
items.desc_zh: 这位美国总统刚刚结束北京峰会，就警告台湾不要正式宣布独立。

items.title_en: Whale found dead near Danish island after German rescue operation
items.title_zh: 德国救援行动后在丹麦岛附近发现鲸鱼死亡
items.desc_en: Wildlife experts had previous criticised the operation, saying it would only cause the animal more distress.
items.desc_zh: 野生动物专家此前批评了这一行动，称这只会给动物带来更多痛苦。

items.title_en: For better or worse, investors are living through Trump’s stock market. Here's why
items.title_zh: 无论好坏，投资者都在经历特朗普的股市。这就是为什么
items.desc_en: President Donald Trump has been considered the ultimate stock market president, overseeing an expansion to record highs as well as major declines.
items.desc_zh: 唐纳德·特朗普总统被认为是股市的终极总统，他见证了股市的扩张，创下历史新高，也见证了股市的大幅下跌。

items.title_en: Trump says Xi agrees Iran must open strait, but no sign China will weigh in
items.title_zh: 特朗普称习近平同意伊朗必须开放海峡，但没有迹象表明中国会介入
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump said Chinese President Xi Jinping had agreed Tehran must reopen the Strait of Hormuz.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，中国国家主席习近平已同意德黑兰必须重新开放霍尔木兹海峡。

items.title_en: Toddlers among more than 50 schoolchildren kidnapped in Nigeria
items.title_zh: 尼日利亚 50 多名学童中的幼儿被绑架
items.desc_en: No group has yet claimed responsibility for the attacks, which have devastated Mussa town in Borno state.
items.desc_zh: 目前还没有任何组织声称对这些袭击负责，这些袭击摧毁了博尔诺州穆萨镇。

items.title_en: Kevin Warsh comes into the Fed facing a big 'family fight' over cutting interest rates
items.title_zh: 凯文·沃什 (Kevin Warsh) 进入美联储，面临降息问题的“家庭斗争”
items.desc_en: With inflation spiking and Treasury yields surging, Warsh is likely to confront a Federal Open Market Committee in no mood to ease.
items.desc_zh: 随着通胀飙升和国债收益率飙升，沃什可能会面对没有心情放松政策的联邦公开市场委员会。

items.title_en: This federal program trains older workers. The Trump administration wants to cut it
items.title_zh: 该联邦计划培训老年工人。特朗普政府想要削减它
items.desc_en: The Senior Community Service Employment Program provides older, low-income individuals with an opportunity to train for work. But its future is uncertain.
items.desc_zh: 老年人社区服务就业计划为老年、低收入个人提供工作培训机会。但它的未来是不确定的。

items.title_en: Global oil stockpiles could hit record lows if Strait of Hormuz remains closed
items.title_zh: 如果霍尔木兹海峡继续关闭，全球石油库存可能创下历史新低
items.desc_en: The world's oil stockpiles could approach all-time lows by the end of May due to the Strait of Hormuz closure, according to UBS.
items.desc_zh: 瑞银表示，由于霍尔木兹海峡关闭，全球石油库存可能在 5 月底接近历史低点。

items.title_zh: 救援潜水员在寻找在马尔代夫洞穴中溺水的意大利人尸体时死亡
items.desc_en: Staff Sgt Mohamed Mahdhee died while diving in the search-and-rescue operation, the Maldives government tells the BBC.
items.desc_zh: 马尔代夫政府告诉英国广播公司，上士穆罕默德·马赫迪在搜救行动中潜水时死亡。

items.title_en: UAE says its decision to leave OPEC was a strategic economic move, not a political one
items.title_zh: 阿联酋表示，退出欧佩克的决定是一项战略性经济举措，而非政治举措
items.desc_en: The United Arab Emirates, which joined OPEC in 1967, announced last month it was leaving the oil producer group on May 1.
items.desc_zh: 阿拉伯联合酋长国于 1967 年加入欧佩克，上个月宣布将于 5 月 1 日退出该石油生产国集团。

items.title_en: Creator content made the main stage at TV's 'upfront' pitches — and not just for YouTube
items.title_zh: 创作者内容成为电视“前期”宣传的主要舞台 - 不仅仅是 YouTube
items.desc_en: In media companies' annual pitch to advertisers this week, creator content played a bigger role as a new category for reaching younger audiences.
items.desc_zh: 在媒体公司本周向广告商进行的年度推介中，创作者内容作为接触年轻受众的新类别发挥了更大的作用。

items.title_en: Meet the pilots flying Spirit Airlines' yellow jets to the desert
items.title_zh: 认识驾驶精神航空黄色喷气式飞机飞往沙漠的飞行员
items.desc_en: Special pilots have been moving Spirit's fleet of yellow jets to the desert.
items.desc_zh: 特种飞行员一直在将勇气号的黄色喷气机机队运送到沙漠。

items.title_en: Cerebras' blockbuster IPO boosts hype for SpaceX and OpenAI, but crowds out smaller players
items.title_zh: Cerebras 的重磅 IPO 推动了 SpaceX 和 OpenAI 的炒作，但排挤了规模较小的公司
items.desc_en: After Cerebras popped in its market debut, all attention turns to SpaceX, OpenAI and Anthropic, which are already among the most valuable U.S. tech companies.
items.desc_zh: Cerebras 首次上市后，所有注意力都转向了 SpaceX、OpenAI 和 Anthropic，它们已经跻身美国最有价值的科技公司之列。

items.title_en: A state banquet, selfies with Musk and Huang's noodle run: The spectacle of Trump's Beijing visit
items.title_zh: 国宴、与马斯克和黄仁勋跑面条的自拍：特朗普北京之行的奇观
items.desc_en: The visit was full of friendly overtures, orchestrated pageantry, business dealmaking, and headline-grabbing sideshows.
items.desc_zh: 这次访问充满了友好的姿态、精心策划的盛会、商业交易和引人注目的杂耍。

items.title_en: Freight train and bus crash kills at least eight in Bangkok
items.title_zh: 曼谷货运火车和巴士相撞事故造成至少八人死亡
items.desc_en: Police and rescue officials said the collision sparked a fire that engulfed the bus.
items.desc_zh: 警方和救援官员表示，碰撞引发大火，吞没了巴士。

items.title_en: Trump says Islamic State group leader was killed in a joint US-Nigerian mission - AP News
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊斯兰国组织领导人在美国和尼日利亚联合行动中被杀 - 美联社新闻

items.title_en: Why Taiwan became the defining issue in the Trump-Xi talks
items.title_zh: 为什么台湾成为特习会谈的决定性问题
items.desc_en: U.S. President Donald Trump had said arms sales to Taiwan would be on the agenda for his talks with Chinese President Xi Jinping which ended Friday.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统唐纳德·特朗普表示，对台军售将列入他与中国国家主席习近平周五结束的会谈议程。

items.title_en: Man killed by 13ft great white shark in Western Australia
items.title_zh: 西澳大利亚男子被13英尺大白鲨杀死
items.desc_en: The man was bitten just before 10:00 (03:00 BST) at Horseshoe Reef - north-west of the popular Rottnest Island near the city of Perth, local police said.
items.desc_zh: 当地警方称，该男子于 10:00（英国夏令时 03:00）之前在马蹄礁 (Horseshoe Reef) 被咬，马蹄礁位于珀斯市附近热门的罗特尼斯岛 (Rottnest Island) 西北部。

items.title_en: Trump says senior IS leader killed by US and Nigerian forces
items.title_zh: 特朗普称伊斯兰国高级领导人被美国和尼日利亚军队杀害
items.desc_en: The US president says the joint operation eliminated "the most active terrorist in the world", Abu-Bilal al-Minuki.
items.desc_zh: 美国总统表示，联合行动消灭了“世界上最活跃的恐怖分子”阿布-比拉勒·米努基。

items.title_en: US planning to criminally indict ex-Cuban leader Raúl Castro
items.title_zh: 美国计划对古巴前领导人劳尔·卡斯特罗提起刑事诉讼
items.desc_en: Charges could come as soon as next week in a case reportedly focused on Cuba's downing of two planes in 1996.
items.desc_zh: 据报道，针对古巴 1996 年击落两架飞机的案件，最快可能于下周提出指控。

items.title_en: From misfit to rap sensation: A 'Reble' storms into Indian hip-hop
items.title_zh: 从格格不入到说唱风潮：“Reble”闯入印度嘻哈界
items.desc_en: Reble has emerged as one of hip-hop’s most distinctive new voices, channelling defiance into a sound rooted in India’s northeast.
items.desc_zh: Reble 已成为嘻哈界最独特的新声音之一，将反抗精神转化为植根于印度东北部的声音。

items.title_en: Jim Cramer fears SpaceX's IPO could be 'destructive' for the rest of market
items.title_zh: Jim Cramer 担心 SpaceX 的 IPO 可能会对其他市场产生“破坏性”
items.desc_en: CNBC's Jim Cramer said he is growing concerned about the speculative nature in the IPO market.
items.desc_zh: CNBC 的 Jim Cramer 表示，他越来越担心 IPO 市场的投机性质。

items.title_en: What is a 'safe death'? Mentally ill woman asks for assisted dying in Canada
items.title_zh: 什么是“安全死亡”？加拿大精神病妇女请求安乐死
items.desc_en: Canada has twice delayed access to medically assisted dying for those with mental illness. Claire Brosseau says she cannot wait any longer and wants the courts to decide.
items.desc_zh: 加拿大两次推迟了精神疾病患者获得医疗辅助死亡的机会。克莱尔·布罗索表示，她不能再等了，希望法院做出裁决。

items.title_en: Switzerland to open secret files on Auschwitz 'Angel of Death' Mengele
items.title_zh: 瑞士将公开奥斯维辛集中营“死亡天使”门格勒的秘密档案
items.desc_en: Mengele fled Europe after the war but for years there were rumours he spent time in Switzerland.
items.desc_zh: 门格勒战后逃离欧洲，但多年来一直有传言说他在瑞士度过了一段时光。

items.title_en: Raybeam
items.title_zh: Raybeam
items.desc_en: A better way to screen share on macOS
items.desc_zh: 在 macOS 上共享屏幕的更好方式

items.title_en: What China critics in Maga movement make of Trump's Beijing trip
items.title_zh: 马加运动中的中国批评者如何评价特朗普的北京之行
items.desc_en: Trump’s softer approach towards China is one that experts say will likely trickle down to the wider MAGA base.
items.desc_zh: 专家表示，特朗普对中国的温和态度可能会影响到更广泛的“让美国再次伟大”的基础。

items.title_en: Israel and Lebanon agree to extend ceasefire, US state department says
items.title_zh: 美国国务院表示以色列和黎巴嫩同意延长停火
items.desc_en: President Trump announced the truce last month, but Israel and Hezbollah have continued to exchange fire since then.
items.desc_zh: 特朗普总统上个月宣布停战，但此后以色列和真主党继续交火。

items.title_en: Trump went big on tech stocks in first quarter of 2026, new filings show
items.title_zh: 新文件显示，特朗普在 2026 年第一季度大举买入科技股
items.desc_en: President Trump bought shares of Amazon, Meta, Oracle, Broadcom, Motorola and Dell worth millions, new ethics disclosure filings show.
items.desc_zh: 新的道德披露文件显示，特朗普总统购买了价值数百万美元的亚马逊、Meta、甲骨文、博通、摩托罗拉和戴尔的股票。

items.title_en: X pledges quicker action on hate and terror content in the UK
items.title_zh: X 承诺对英国的仇恨和恐怖内容采取更快的行动
items.desc_en: Ofcom said the commitments were of particular importance after recent crimes targeting Jewish communities in the UK.
items.desc_zh: Ofcom 表示，在英国最近发生针对犹太社区的犯罪事件后，这些承诺尤为重要。

items.title_en: Claim, counter-claim and tech's seedy side exposed: Five things we learned in the Musk-Altman trial
items.title_zh: 索赔、反索赔和科技的肮脏一面暴露：我们在马斯克-奥特曼审判中学到的五件事
items.desc_en: As the jury deliberates, this is what we found out during the weeks-long trial with two tech titans at its heart.
items.desc_zh: 正如陪审团审议的那样，这是我们在以两位科技巨头为核心的长达数周的审判中发现的结果。

items.title_en: Inside the secretive and lucrative world of orchid breeding
items.title_zh: 走进兰花育种的秘密和利润丰厚的世界
items.desc_en: It can take a decade to bring a new orchid to market, so breeders keep their hi-tech processes secret.
items.desc_zh: 将新兰花推向市场可能需要十年的时间，因此育种者对其高科技流程保密。

items.title_en: AI could put people off tech jobs and hurt the economy, warns Raspberry Pi boss
items.title_zh: Raspberry Pi 老板警告说，人工智能可能会让人们失业并损害经济
items.desc_en: Eben Upton warns against claims that Artificial Intelligence will destroy vast numbers of computing roles over the coming years.
items.desc_zh: 埃本·厄普顿 (Eben Upton) 对人工智能将在未来几年摧毁大量计算角色的说法提出警告。

items.title_en: 'Millions' of pounds saved by replacing Palantir tech in refugee system
items.title_zh: 通过在难民系统中更换 Palantir 技术节省了“数百万英镑”
items.desc_en: The government said its in-house IT system was "more flexible" while meeting "high standards" of security.
items.desc_zh: 政府表示，其内部IT系统“更加灵活”，同时满足“高标准”的安全性。

items.title_en: HMRC to use AI from British tech firm to spot fraud and tax return errors
items.title_zh: 英国税务海关总署将使用英国科技公司的人工智能来发现欺诈和纳税申报错误
items.desc_en: Quantexa, a financial data platform, won the £175m contract to spot fraud and tax return errors.
items.desc_zh: 金融数据平台 Quantexa 赢得了价值 1.75 亿英镑的合同，以发现欺诈和纳税申报错误。

items.title_en: WhatsApp launches totally private 'incognito' conversations with its AI chatbot
items.title_zh: WhatsApp 与其人工智能聊天机器人推出完全私密的“隐身”对话
items.desc_en: A cyber security expert says deleting chat history could lead to a lack of accountability if things go wrong.
items.desc_zh: 一位网络安全专家表示，如果出现问题，删除聊天记录可能会导致缺乏责任感。

items.title_en: Suicide forum fined £950,000 for not blocking UK users
items.title_zh: 自杀论坛因未屏蔽英国用户而被罚款 95 万英镑
items.desc_en: The regulator said the forum had not done enough to protect UK users - but critics accuse Ofcom of acting too slowly.
items.desc_zh: 该监管机构表示，该论坛在保护英国用户方面做得不够，但批评者指责 Ofcom 行动太慢。

items.title_en: Thousands of Waymo robotaxis recalled over risk of entering flooded roads
items.title_zh: 数千辆 Waymo 机器人出租车因存在进入被洪水淹没的道路的风险而被召回
items.desc_en: The voluntary recall follows an incident on 20 April where an empty Waymo car entered a flooded road in San Antonio, Texas.
items.desc_zh: 此次自愿召回是在 4 月 20 日发生的一起事件之后发生的，当时一辆空的 Waymo 汽车进入德克萨斯州圣安东尼奥市一条被洪水淹没的道路。

items.desc_zh: 免费工具可修复您的 LinkedIn 以便被 AI 招聘人员发现

items.title_en: More than 70 million warnings sent to people seeking child abuse material
items.title_zh: 向寻求虐待儿童材料的人们发出了超过 7000 万条警告
items.desc_en: The messages highlight the illegality of what people are searching for online and direct them towards help.
items.desc_zh: 这些消息强调人们在网上搜索的内容是非法的，并引导他们寻求帮助。

items.title_en: Smart glasses are 'an invasion of privacy' - Meta's are selling better than ever
items.title_zh: 智能眼镜“侵犯隐私”——Meta 的销量比以往任何时候都好
items.desc_en: The biggest tech firms are set to sell millions of smart glasses despite growing privacy concerns.
items.desc_zh: 尽管隐私问题日益严重，但最大的科技公司仍将销售数百万副智能眼镜。

items.desc_zh: 摇摇欲坠的道路和其他危险——人工智能能让我们的街道更安全吗？

items.title_en: Sam Altman: Elon Musk wanted control of OpenAI even after death
items.title_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼：埃隆·马斯克死后仍想控制 OpenAI
items.desc_en: Sam Altman said Elon Musk tried many times for total control of OpenAI, which he's now suing.
items.desc_zh: 山姆·奥尔特曼表示，埃隆·马斯克曾多次尝试完全控制 OpenAI，目前他正在起诉 OpenAI。

items.title_en: Canvas hack: company pays criminals to delete students' stolen data
items.title_zh: Canvas 黑客：公司付钱给犯罪分子，让他们删除学生被盗的数据
items.desc_en: The company behind Canvas says it has "reached an agreement" with the hackers who disrupted thousands of colleges and universities.
items.desc_zh: Canvas 背后的公司表示，它已经与扰乱数千所学院和大学的黑客“达成协议”。
